zh.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers是John d'Avilliers的女兒，於1207年出生在英國素福爾可布拉德維爾。她於大約1249年與Simon FitzAdam在英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈特菲爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1266年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers是John d'Avilliers的女儿，于1207年出生在英国素福爾可布拉德維爾。她于大约1249年与Simon FitzAdam在英国英格兰賀特福爾哈特菲爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1266年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Avilliers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Etienne, Andre, Raoul.  Dutch Adriaan, Willem.
French: variant, with fused preposition de ‘from’, of Villiers . Compare Devillers and Devillier .

History: The progenitor of the majority of the American bearers of the surname Devilliers or De Villiers was Nicolas-Antoine Coulon, sieur/chevalier de Villiers, from France, who arrived in QC in 1703. In 1705, he married Angélique Jarret de Verchères. He was an officer in the French army. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Devillers and Devillier, and also the surname Jumonville .

variants.name: Villiers
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Devillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cecile, Jacques, Maudry, Raoul.
French: variant of   Devilliers   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Devillier are descendants of Nicolas-Antoine Coulon, sieur de Villiers, from France (see Devilliers ).

variants.name: Jumonville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Jean-Paul, Marcel.
French: topographic name shortened from the title sieur de Jumonville, which refers to Jumeauville, a place in Yvelines. The surname Jumonville is not found in France.
History: Joseph Coulon de Villiers, sieur de Jumonville, a son of Nicolas-Antoine Coulon, sieur de Villiers, from France (see Devilliers ), married Marie-Marguerite Soumande in Montreal, QC, in 1745.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers was born in 1207, in Bradwell, Suffolk, England as the daughter of John d'Avilliers. She married Simon FitzAdam about 1249, in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1266, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers est née en 1207, à Bradwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, fille de John d'Avilliers. Elle a épousé Simon FitzAdam environ 1249, à Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1266, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers wurde 1207 in Bradwell, Suffolk, England, als Tochter von John d'Avilliers geboren. Sie hat um 1249 in Hatfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Simon FitzAdam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1266 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers è nata il nel 1207 nel Bradwell, Suffolk, England come figlia di John d'Avilliers. Lei sposato Simon FitzAdam circa 1249, nel Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1266, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliersは1207年にイギリススフォルクブラドウエルでJohn d'Avilliersの娘として生まれた。約1249年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアハトフィールドでSimon FitzAdamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1266年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers(은)는 1207년 영국 수폴크 브라드웰에서 John d'Avilliers의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 하트필드에서 Simon FitzAdam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers nasceu em 1207, em Bradwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra filha de John d'Avilliers. Ela casou-se com Simon FitzAdam aproximadamente 1249, em Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1266, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers родилась в 1207 г. в местности брадвелл, суффолк, Англия. Её отца звали John d'Avilliers. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon FitzAdam около 1249 г. в местности хатфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1266 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Finetta d'Avilliers nació en 1207, en Bradwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hija de John d'Avilliers. Se casó con Simon FitzAdam aproximadamente 1249, en Hatfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1266, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
